entry.title: Re: "Master data" explained for beginners

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hi @sdeissenboeck,

Thanks for your comment and trying out this solution.

I have created a repository which contains the wrapper and a sample task UI. You can simply clone it, install dependencies for each project, and start the task UI by `npm start`.

entry.title: How to transport content version from our dev/test system to the production system
entry.content:
Hi team,
for our production system, I am not able to assign any template for new application or the existing one available, due to the content version on our production being lower than our development. How do we transport this to our production system? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to transport content version from our dev/test sy...
entry.content:
Hi team,

To transport your content version from your dev/test system to your production system:

  1. Go to transaction solman_setup
  2. Select Application Operations -> System Monitoring
  3. Go to step 4 Template Maintenance 
  4. Select the "Generate Request" button
  5. In the new window, select "Applied Content Version", then "Generate Request"

Thanks & regards,

Conor, 

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Platform Integration - Standard Content Update Governance
entry.content: Is there any email notification sent to customers (Integration suite admin) for these updates to standard integration packages?

entry.title: Re: SAP BW Bridge InfoObject Hierarchy Re-Use in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Just a quick hint from my side:

I guess you have also shell-converted ADSOs into BW bridge. If you run entity import for one of the ADSOs, you should get a better idea how to work with dimensions.

entry.title: Re: SAP BW Bridge InfoObject Hierarchy Re-Use in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Just a quick hint from my side:

I guess you have also shell-converted ADSOs into BW bridge. If you run entity import for one of the ADSOs, you should get a better idea how to work with dimensions.

entry.title: Translate API call to API expression
entry.content:
Hi all

We using Successfactor to Entra ID provisioning, and need to add an attribute that's not in the default mapping range. I've added some changes to advanced attribute mapping or directly to schema json, in this list.

the API call is this: 
/odata/v2/PerPhone?$select=countryCodeNav/externalCode,isPrimary,personIdExternal,phoneNumber,phoneType,phoneTypeNav/externalCode&$expand=countryCodeNav,phoneTypeNav

any type of documentation for this or any ideas to help med align this? Translating API CALL to API Expression

entry.title: Re: What’s New for SAP Build Apps – Mobile Authentication
entry.content:
Hello, I am confused about a use case, I am interested in knowing if it is viable cost/benefit to solve it through BuildApps, since it is about creating an APP for anonymous users, and in that sense, what I understand is that each anonymous user who uses the app must be licensed, counted as an ActiveUser and that increases the cost exponentially, is this assessment correct? Is there a way to solve this use case with buildapps without that subscription impact (ActiveUsers)?

I appreciate your help.

entry.title: Re: Guide in a needed middleware integration with SAP
entry.content: Thank you very much, we are in the process of trial server installation and trying to build a proof of concept with the components you told us. I guess in a week or so I might be back with more questions, or better yet, just to confirm it worked as explained.

entry.title: Re: Cross-company code revenue-generating projects
entry.content:
Hello,

For "Projects with Revenue" it is standard behaviour that all WBS elements must belong to the same Company Code. Please refer to SAP Help https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/f369b2eff700401494ba6e7c9a573288/9a0de7da641f4b0885a1a686efb21a6f.html which details this:

  • In a project with revenue, all WBS elements must be assigned to the same company code. You cannot include WBS elements from a project with a different company code.

Best Regards,

Brendan

entry.title: Re: iOS build fails
entry.content:
Please confirm that you thoroughly followed the instructions below, mind the details please as they're usually the cause of the issues: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-discussions/ios-build-fails/m-p/13678713/highlight/true#M1580

N.B. - Don't forget the .p12 password during file creation & then build configuration

entry.title: Re: Buchungskreisübergreifende Erlösführende Projekte
entry.content:
Hello,

For "Projects with Revenue" it is standard behaviour that all WBS elements must belong to the same Company Code. Please refer to SAP Help https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/f369b2eff700401494ba6e7c9a573288/9a0de7da641f4b0885a1a686efb21a6f.html which details this:

  • In a project with revenue, all WBS elements must be assigned to the same company code. You cannot include WBS elements from a project with a different company code.

Best Regards,

Brendan

entry.title: Re: Which SAP note generates the report "NOTE_3116373"?
entry.content: Programs with the naming convention NOTE_XXXXXXX are sometimes included as correction instructions in the note that can be implemented in SNOTE. Other times they are included as an attachment that you can download and import manually in SE38/SE80/Eclipse ADT.

entry.title: Re: Migration of the documents from ECC to S/4
entry.content:
@SSB  Excellent blog. I have always enjoyed your blog. I still see that only DMS attachments are supported for S/4 migration. If the DMS attachments are in SAP DB instead of content server, we would have additional work to make this attachments available in S4. Is that correct? 

What is the strategy for GOS attachments? Should we create custom program to migrate this documents? Or is there a plan for supporting this requirement? 

When we migrate business documents that have attachments in (archive link) content server, are the link tables migrated as well? (as long as the link to old content server exist, the attachments can be retrieved from S/4).

entry.title: Re: 🇨🇴 SAP Build: Create Apps and Processes Without Code (Bogota, Colombia)

entry.title: Re: 🇨🇴 Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh (Bogota, Colombia
entry.content: #Kudos @ajmaradiaga @josh_bentley Thank you for sharing your technical knowledge in Bogotá ... We will be there.

entry.title: Re: From FSD document in TM to Create PO in ERP with other than item category U
entry.content: The problem was resolved by associating an OKB9 by CO, assigning a valid cost center for each center.

entry.title: C# Script SAP GUI Select text and hit copy button
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to select the text on a SAP GUI control and copy it to the clipboard.

I have been able to navigate through the tabs and menus but cannot understand how the text can be selected (can be small or longer texts) and the button can be pressed to achieve this.

Image for reference attached.

We have been blocked for using the scripts recording and if it wasn't for Stefan Schnell tracker it would be even worse. We can still run scripts to the moment and it is a very useful tool.

Can anyone help?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: About assigning roles to content objects in SAP Enabl...
entry.content:
Hi Angad,

You cannot include multiple Roles in a single Assignment so you will have to create a second Assignment record.  You can add multiple Assignment records to the same content object so this will not be an issue.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Attach copy of purchase order when it's changed in ME22N
entry.content: As of 6/19/2024, this is still an issue. The document won't attach when using a custom program in NACE transaction.

entry.title: How to write financial plan data with API?
entry.content:
We would like to know which API can be used to write financial plan data in S/4HANA Public Cloud, since we don't want to use standard template.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to write financial plan data with API?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


In order to write financial plan data from one system to another you can make use of below API. It is based on an OData service and can be consumed by external systems or user interfaces in a financial plan data scenario.

Financial Plan Data - Write
API_FINPLANNINGDATA_SRV


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: SAP GUI Scripts Recorder not available anymore - What are the alternatives?
entry.content:
Hello,

Very simple question: How can we create scripts from scratch?

In the past we were able to use the scripts recorder. We can't anymore.

What alternatives are available to overcome this problem?

We can still run scripts but not record them.

Please feedback.

Thank you.

entry.title: Using Custom Roles to control content access for users in SAP Enable Now (SEN)
entry.content:
We want to assign SEN Workarea content objects to specific custom roles, as the client wanted to establish role-based restrictions to access content objects in the work area.

To test this, I created two custom roles – Test Role A and Test Role B. Then, I assigned these custom roles to some users in SEN Manager.

Next, I created content assignments as follows:

Example 01:

The content object “Contract Management” needs to be assigned to 2 custom roles – Test Role A and Test Role B. For that, I navigated to the Course tab of this content object, and added two assignments for the same content object - One for Test Role A, and the other for Test Role B. Note that, I did not add the Learner role to the assignments here. See the picture below.

Example 02:

The content object “Requisition Management” needs to be assigned to only 1 custom role – Test Role A. See the picture below.

Next, I asked the specific users (with Test Role A and Test Role B in SEN) to log into SEN Manager and access their Learner View. I could see that the users could see only that content, which I assigned to them. It indicates the access control was successful this way. See the pictures below.

The Leaner View of users with Test Role A. here, the users could see two content objects assigned to them – “Contract Management” and “Requisition Management”.

The Learner View of the Test Role B. Here, the users could see only one content object assigned to them – “Contract Management”.

My Question – Is this the right way to achieve the role-based restrictions to access content in the LEAERNR VIEW of SEN Manager? Is there any other alternative?

entry.title: Change Company Code Currency after go live
entry.content:
Dear community,

One of my customers needs to change the company currency from its local currency to a stonger currency like EUR. The company is in production from long time ago.

I know that if we performe the changes, several inconsisitencies will comes up. Is there other workaround to do it without the system inconsistencies.?

Thankyou very much for your help.

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!

entry.title: Content ServerとCache ServerのEWA機能サポート
entry.content:
Note1257308 を確認しまして、Content ServerとCache ServerはEWA機能をサポートしていない認識で合っていますでしょうか？

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Content ServerとCache ServerのEWA機能サポート
entry.content:
ご担当者様

平素よりお世話になっております。

はい、ご認識の通りです。EWA機能はContent ServerとCache Serverに対し、サポートされません。

以上。よろしくお願いいたします。
SAP サポート

entry.title: Improved ‘Get Support’ Experience: Enhanced Placement of Detailed Description & AI Recommendations
entry.content:
In our continuous effort to enhance the SAP for Me ‘Get Support’ user experience, we’re introducing a change that’ll streamline the information flow and provide more accurate recommendations.

We’ll discuss the details of this change, the trial period, how you can provide feedback, and what to expect next.

What is new?

The ‘Detailed Description’ field was moved up directly under the ‘Short Description’ field.

The primary motivation behind this change is to leverage the power of AI to provide users with more accurate information. Our AI service can analyze the additional information provided in the 'Detailed Description' and offer more relevant solutions, which are now placed at the bottom instead of the right-hand side.

Time Period for the Change

We understand that any change takes time to adjust to, which is why we are implementing this as a trial version. The trial period will last approximately 30 days, during which we’ll closely monitor user feedback and evaluate the impact of the change. This will allow us to make any necessary adjustments before implementing the change permanently.

*Please note that the trial version is limited to a specific group of users. We do not offer the option to opt-in or opt-out. We appreciate your understanding and participation in this trial as we strive to enhance our product. Thank you for your cooperation during this trial period.

 

Where to share feedback?

Your feedback is crucial in helping us improve our services. To provide feedback on this change, please use the 'Feedback Slider' on the right-hand side. Simply click on the slider and share your thoughts, suggestions, or any issues you may have encountered. We highly value your input and will carefully consider all feedback received.

What to expect ?

Following the successful launch of the trial version, we’ll focus on refining the ‘Get Support’ application. We value your feedback in identifying areas for improvement that can be leveraged to further enhance the user experience. Stay tuned for updates on our progress and the next release of the ‘Get Support’ application.

entry.title: Re: Fast SAPUI5 Develop tool
entry.content:
Hello, all,

       You can try the latest version from https://fast-fiori-development-tool.cfapps.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/index.html 

regards

Lucky

entry.title: Re: Responsibility Management: Create Your Teams (2/5)
entry.content:
Hello Matjaž,

Yes, it is possible to create custom team categories using Manage Team Categories app. Please find more details in the below link.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/b883d1f5a097446598e8912bb480a4ec.html?locale=en-US

Also, please note that, as of now this team category can be used only for Situation Handling usecases.

Hope this answers.

Thanks and Best Regards

Gaayathri VL

entry.title: How MFBF function can extend material valuation type view when GR finished goods?
entry.content:
1. Use MFBF t-code to do confirmation, input with value '5' as field <To batch> 

2. Meanwhile, we can find that there is a new line of valuation type 5 will be insert in transparent table MBEW

3. But we can not find any change log in material master data. So I was curious about which standard BAPI or function model achieve this? 

Many thanks for your replying in advance! 🙂

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content: @MenardR  It will be around the release date of July 18.

entry.title: Re: SAP上海客户成功日-6.19号SAP Labs China
SAP 分析云 2024.12版功能更新
entry.content:
SAP 分析云是一款先进的商务分析云解决方案，集商业智能（BI）、增强分析、预测分析和企业规划功能于一体，消除单点解决方案和数据孤岛挑战，能提供您需要的全面云分析功能。

本文介绍了 SAP 分析云 2024.12 版本的新功能。这些新功能已经在 SAP 分析云 FastTrack 客户的系统上线。对于 SAP 分析云季度发布周期（QRC）客户，此版本及其功能将作为 QRC 2024年第3季度版本的一部分提供。在此处可以查看 QRC 发布时间表。 

 

系统和技术要求

尽管不是必需的，我们推荐您升级到最新的 SAP 分析云代理版本1.0.407，以利用所有数据采集类型。

代理的最低版本仍为 1.0.75，但以下情况除外：

  • SAP ERP/SQL 数据库的版本 1.0.99
  • SAP universe （UNX） 的版本 1.0.365（SAP 分析云代理需要其他设置步骤，有关详细信息，请参阅 SAP 说明 3262098）
  • SAP Business Warehouse （BW） 的版本 1.0.353
  • SAP HANA View 的版本 1.0.235
  • File Server版本 1.0.248

有关详细信息，请参阅系统要求和技术先决条件。

有关SAP BW与SAP分析云集成的支持功能和需求更新，请参阅SAP Note 2541557了解更多详细信息。

有关通过 SAP分析云的 SAP BusinessObjects Live Data Connect 实时访问Universe时的支持功能和需求更新，请参阅 SAP Note 2771921了解更多详细信息。

请从“Service Marketplace”下载最新版本的简易部署工具包。

  • 注意：为避免下载旧版本，以及可能让用户面对Cloud Connector 与 SAPJVM 或 Apache Tomcat 的不当绑定问题，只有三个最新版本的工具包可供下载。

有关云代理版本变更管理详情，请参阅 SAP Note 3264839。

 

更新亮点

  • 管理和服务管理
    • 租户链接选项卡更新
  • 面向计划和分析的人工智能
    • Just Ask：提示指南
    • Just Ask：显示维度属性
  • 故事设计
    • 将默认调色板应用于表中的单元格统计图
  • 故事可扩展性
    • 自定义小组件增强：隐藏无值数据
    • 在 PDF/PPTX 导出中对所有包含的页面应用缩放度量

 

功能类别命名更新

在深入了解之前，您可能已经注意到路线图和产品计划中列出了一个新功能类别。我们将“增强分析”更名为“面向计划和分析的人工智能”。

 

管理和服务管理

租户链接选项卡更新

管理员可以配置 SAP 分析云租户和 SAP Datasphere 租户之间的链接。此配置之前位于系统/管理页面的“系统配置”标签上。现已将其移动到同一页面上名为“租户链接”的新标签。移动该选项卡是为了突出显示此功能，并为将来的类似配置提供空间。在其他连接中，此配置将在 SAP 分析云的右上角设置产品切换器，允许用户快速链接到 SAP Datasphere 等其他相关产品。

 

面向计划和分析的人工智能

Just Ask：提示指南

提示指南可为用户提供最佳使用Just Ask功能的指导，包括以下几方面：

  • 查询问题示例
  • 主要功能亮点
  • 优化性能提示

 

Just Ask：显示维度属性

Just Ask中模型的维属性可见于以下模块：

  • 选择搜索栏旁边的 + 按钮时
  • “模型概览”选项卡（在“管理模型”区域中）
  • “发掘数据”选项卡（在“管理模型”区域中）
  • “规则”部分

 

故事设计

将默认调色板应用于表中的单元格统计图

在优化故事体验中，用户可以在主题偏好设置中为统计图选择默认的调色板，这现在也可用于表中的单元格内统计图。表格单元格中的条形图或柱形图以所选调色板的第一个颜色显示。如果在表生成器面板中选择不同的颜色，则会使用该颜色，对默认调色板的任何更改都不会应用到该表格的单元格内图表。

 

 

故事可扩展性

自定义微件增强：隐藏无值数据

故事设计人员现在可以在自定义微件中显示或隐藏无值数据。

 

在 PDF/PPTX 导出中对所有包含的页面应用缩放度量

将故事导出为 PDF 文件到 PPTX 文件时，故事查看者现在可以选择“在所有包含的页面中应用按比例缩放的度量值”，这样图表度量值在导出文件的各页面中就具有相同的比例。该选项在默认情况下关闭，只有在图表缩放中存在活动度量时才可用。

 

 

本文仅提供 SAP 分析云的最新功能和改进功能的高级概述。您可以在针对FastTrack客户的应用内帮助指南中找到有关这些功能的更多详细信息，如果您想了解更多关于FastTrack和季度发布周期发布的信息，请参阅这篇SAP 知识库文章。

如果您对本博文的内容有任何疑问，可以在下方发表评论。如果您有具体的产品或技术问题，请在我们的 SAP Analytics Cloud 问答论坛上提问。访问我们的 SAP Analytics Cloud 社区页面，了解更多产品信息、卓越实践等。查看我们的 SAP 路线图浏览器，了解 SAP Analytics Cloud 即将推出的更多功能。

entry.title: Re: Are we charged for enabling "Cloud Foundary" for enab...
entry.content:
Hi Ravi,

No, you dont get charged for only enabling the "Cloud Foundry" in your subaccount.
But be careful when assigning the entitlements. If you subscribe or create instances, please ensure you are selecting plans from the "Free Tier."

For example, I have my SAP contract as PAYG and have been using Integration Suite—free (Application)—to create service keys. I have also created instances of "Process Integration Runtime," which do not have a cost associated with them.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Send Asynchrnous Message from SAP OnPremise to 3rd pa...
entry.content:
Hi Pallavi,

Leveraging SAP Integration Suite's "Event Mesh" + "Cloud Integration" capabilities together with the standard S/4HANA events for Business Partner "changed" you can use a Publish-Subscribe pattern to get all BP changes and then retrieve the data for the BP using the standard Business Partner OData API.

Your architecture will be as follows:

S/4HANA -- > BTP Event Mesh --> BTP Cloud Integration --> S/4HANA OData API --> BTP Cloud Integration --> Third-Party System

Here is the documentation you might need:

Enable Events in S/4HANA 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/810dfd34f2cc4f39aa8d946b5204fd9c/c200f98fadb64ff1828ed5696c86fca2.html?q=Event%20enablement%20framework&locale=en-US

Business Partner Event S/4HANA
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/44e06f22436c43e582db6ccd5250e29b/a75345282ddd4054a1e5ce7687e4b088.html?locale=en-US

Configure Connectivity from S/4HANA OP to BTP Event Mesh
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/knock-the-scp-ems-door-from-backend-op-event-messaging-service-in-scp/ba-p/13456309

Here is another blog that might help you with all the tasks. https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-enterprise-messaging-for-s-4hana-on-premises/ba-p/13400232

Note: If you don't need to update the 3rd-party system with the BP data and only inform of a change on a particular BP, then that can be handled directly from BTP Event Mesh.

Best regards,

entry.title: Codice referral OKX: 69809443 (Come iscriversi al bonus nel 2024?)
entry.content:
Cerchi un codice referral OKX? Utilizza il codice **69809443** durante la registrazione per ricevere un bonus speciale per il 2024. Condividi il tuo codice di riferimento per ridurre le commissioni di negoziazione del 50%. OKX è uno scambio di criptovaluta sicuro e di prim'ordine per Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, EOS e altro.

Cos'è il codice referral OKX? Per il 2024, il codice referral OKX è 69809443. Utilizza il codice **69809443** nell'app OKX per sconti sulle commissioni di negoziazione in corso. I nuovi utenti guadagnano fino al 50% in commissioni di trading per ogni referral andato a buon fine.

Miglior codice referral OKX per il 2024: Il codice referral OKX consigliato è **69809443** e offre fino a $ 10.000 in bonus. Condividi questo codice per guadagnare una commissione del 50%, migliorando la tua esperienza di trading.

entry.title: Re: When Use MRBR in CDHDR input does not update in the T...
entry.content:
Hi,

You means there is a record of changing RSEG in CDHDR but the invoice still blocked?

entry.title: Re: KONH - how to identify deleted conditions?
entry.content:
Hi, 

You only need to care about the kopos = 01, if its corresponding loevm_ko = abap_true, then this condition record is deleted. The other kopos != 01 are the supplements of this condition record.

BRs,
Archer

entry.title: Re: How to set up destination for SAP MDK app in SAP Mobi...
entry.content:
Dear Bill,

Sorry for my delayed answer. Yes, I had already tried oauth2clientcrendentials as my first approach. However it turned out that it was the problem with the way url encoded data is transmitted and was causing the request to fail due to incorrect credentials.

 

Best Regards,

Geet

entry.title: OKX Referans Kodu: 69809443 (%50 indirim ücreti bonusu nasıl talep edilir?)
entry.content:
OKX Referans Kodu mu arıyorsunuz? 2024'e özel bir bonus almak için kayıt sırasında **69809443** kodunu kullanın. Referans kodunuzu paylaşarak işlem ücretlerini %50 azaltın. OKX, Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, EOS ve daha fazlası için en yüksek puan alan, güvenli kripto para borsasıdır.

 

OKX Referans Kodu nedir? 2024 için, OKX Referans Kodu 69809443'tür. Devam eden işlem ücreti indirimleri için OKX uygulamasında **69809443** kodunu kullanın. Yeni kullanıcılar, her başarılı tavsiye için %50'ye kadar işlem komisyonu kazanır.

 

 

2024 için En İyi OKX Referans Kodu: Önerilen OKX Referans Kodu **69809443** olup, 10.000$'a kadar bonus sunar. %50 komisyon kazanmak ve ticaret deneyiminizi geliştirmek için bu kodu paylaşın.

entry.title: Re: Send Asynchrnous Message from SAP OnPremise to 3rd pa...
entry.content: Thanks very much for this. Apologies I didn't mention this in my original question. We are currently using SAP CRM onPrem to manage BP data.

entry.title: Re: Send Asynchrnous Message from SAP OnPremise to 3rd pa...
entry.content: I was exploring option for Adding Netweaver addon for event enablement and event mesh to publich event from SAP CRM to SAP event mesh. I need to get in touch with our Basis team to discuss this approach. Please let me know if there is any other better approach to do the same. Thanks

entry.title: Approval emails in IBP
entry.content:
Hi experts, is there any way using which we can trigger approval emails to outlook directly from IBP?

I know we have recent updates in Process Management functionality in IBP which allows approval process but for that also an approver has to access inbox only through fiori apps. Similarly, for Workzone as well, users have to access inbox on the Workzone platform to approve requests. And hence, i didnt find any case where we have a standard option of triggering emails from IBP directly to outlook for approvals (by that i mean, the email should have an option to approve/reject the request and the status has to be updated back to IBP).

Please advise/share if you know there is a standard way to do this through IBP.

Regards

Kunal

entry.title: Re: (how) can we use IN clause in $filter
entry.content: Has this feature been released yet, or not?

entry.title: Re: _EVT_OBJECT element in event container not filled aft...
entry.content:
Hi,

As you've already noticed yourself, the 'CREATED' event is being populated with the contract's INTRENO as the object key, instead of BUKRS and RECNNR (as required by BUS5105). You'll have to track down where the event is being raised and either fix it yourself (if its custom) or raise an incident with SAP.  Try a breakpoint in function module SWE_EVENT_CREATE or SAP_WAPI_CREATE_EVENT.

sterkte
Paul

entry.title: Why my User Defined Field does not refresh when other field changes
entry.content:
Hi Experts i create a UDF and a Query which compute number of days between two date using DATEDIFF and i want to show it to UDF Field, i setup it using FMS when AR Invoice due date field is change it will automatically compute to the UDF field the total Difference of my Posting Date and Due Date, but apparently it does not refresh at all. here is a sample of my code.

DATEDIFF(DAY,U_CounterDate,T0.DocDate + 10 ) FROM OINV T0 WHERE T0.[DocNum] = $[OINV.DocNum]

entry.title: MRKO process to post by material level not by material document level
entry.content: Hi, we are running MRKO process for month end to settle consigned chemicals. Because of the volume of transactions we are keep getting maximum FI docuement number reach error. My question is, can we settle by grouping on number of materials rather than individual material document number? (to reduce the number of lines)

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi Jens, sounds good and if time allows, I'd be happy to come to Bamberg to take part.

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud - European Accessibility Act Support
entry.content: Thank you for the response, Bill

entry.title: Re: Error in Flexible Workflow for PR
entry.content:
The error message says that the role 'SuperiorOfWorkflowInitator' cannot be resolved, which suggests the issue is in the Org Chart: No manager can be found.

I'm not familiar with this role, but I bet it is based on the standard rule 168 (Superior)

You can check whether your initiator does indeed have a manager (superior) by testing rule 168 in transaction PFAC; enter the WF initiator user & execute.

chrs
Paul

entry.title: Location Product Substitution- SAP IBP (Infinite Heuristics)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are using SAP Infinite heuristics to propagate demand from Finished goods to their Components. Pretty straightforward demand propagation, nothing fancy. However, we are also using Location Product Substitution master data (PROMOTION Reason Code) for some of the components. This is just to transfer the net demand from leading component to the substitute component during the promotion phase. This works fine, if the substitute component is used to substitute demand for just 1 leading product. However, interchangeability master data is completely ignored if the same substitute is used for multiple leading products (master data screen shot below- 2 different leading products) and no net demand gets transferred to the substitute at all.

The behavior above is also mentioned in the SAP help portal where it says that 1 substitute can only be used for 1 leading product however, logically it doesn't make sense as 1 substitute can be used to substitute multiple leading products in several business scenarios. Has anyone else experience this & found a workaround (maybe through attribute transformation)? Please share your views.

Thanks

Kunal

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Process Managerでべスプラのフローを改良してみる

@samuel_bianchi 

I appreciate your kind message and invitation for the LinkedIn Group, despite my blog in Japanese.

I've requested my attendance to the community.

I'm looking forward to interacting with the community members.

Thank you.

Koichiro Ogawa

entry.title: POS sales posting for B2C and B2B customers into SAP
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We have a scenario where we need to post the B2C sales and B2B sales from POS to SAP S4.(Note there is no CAR or POSDTA intervention here).

For B2C sales we post the sales to SAP with respect to store wise and for B2B we post with respect to customer wise.

Now from finance when they want to see sales for the entire store, which is combination of both B2B and B2C.

Can you some please shed your inputs here.

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: ClientId of Document Extraction inside SAP Process Automation
entry.content: @sabarna17, this api only gives the clientIDs for DIE instances which are created by us manually from BTP cockpit. But I want to find the client ID for DIE instance which is created automatically as soon as we create first template inside SAP process automation project, this instance is called irpa_shared.

entry.title: Re: Copy Inspection Results - Data selection procedure 30...
entry.content:
The answer is available at the following URL.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/copy-inspection-lot-results-from-one-lot-to-other-lot/qaq-p/12804914

entry.title: Re: Version variance as calculated measure at the model l...
entry.content:
Hi! Have you try to use the "lookup" function in the formula editor of the modeler to create a calculation comparison between different versions?

1. first create a measure

2. in the formula editor type the following formula: in this case, i calculate the "gross sales completion rate" by divide the gross sales of the actual version by the gross sales of the budget version. Of course you can use subtraction or other formula according to your needs.
LOOKUP([GROSS_SALES],[d/Version]="public.Actual")/LOOKUP([GROSS_SALES],[d/Version]="public.Budget")

3. save this measure. then you can find it in your story and use it everywhere.

entry.title: Re: Responsibility Management: Create Your Teams (2/5)
entry.content:

I think this app is only available in S4 HANA Cloud. Is it possible to manage this on premise? I tried inserting a team category directly into table RSM_V_TEAM_TYP_C and it works but just seems wrong

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Re: SAP DS - Split a Field at Separator into Multiple Rows
entry.content: Hi @Sandra_Rossi , thanks a lot, the error got resolved but unfortunately the expected output is not in the right way(Please find the screenshot). There should been only 2 rows with 7 and 14 as values instead it was 3 rows with a NULL value,14 and 7,14. Where did it go wrong?

entry.title: Generative AI Jargons Simplified: Part 1 - Prompt Engineering
entry.content:
In my previous blog series, Generative AI for Beginner, we have learnt the basic concepts around AI, Generative AI, Large Language Model etc. 

In this blog series, I will focus on explaining important jargons related to Generative AI. To make it super simple, I will provide an analogy, and use layman’s terms.

To make it easy to read, I will publish it as a series. Each blog will cover one generative AI topic.

Part 1 — Prompt Engineering [Current Blog]

Part 2 — AI Model [To be published on 27th June]

Part 3 — Grounding [To be published]

Part 4 — Hallucination [To be published]

Part 5 — RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) [To be published]

Part 6 — To be decided………….

 

This is 1st blog in this series. The jargon is Prompt Engineering.

Note: I strongly recommend you to go through the previous blog series Generative AI for Beginner. It will only take 90 minutes of your time. No perquisites. You will get a crystal-clear idea on AI and generative AI.

Let’s start!

Prompt Engineering — An Analogy from Real-life

Imagine you are in a world-renowned kitchen with a highly skilled chef. The chef has an extensive knowledge of cuisines, ingredients, and cooking techniques and he can prepare any dish you desire

To get the exact meal you want, you must give the chef clear, precise instructions. If you don’t communicate properly, the chef cannot create the perfect dish for you.

 

The above image is generated using Microsoft Copilot

For example, if you just say — “Make me dinner.” The chef is left with a broad and vague request and has to guess your preferences. You might end up with something you like, but it’s equally possible that the dish won’t meet your expectations. It may be that you are in a mood to have chicken curry and garlic bread, but the chef prepared a world-class pasta.

Hence, to get exactly the meal you want, you must provide more details, like — “Make me a chicken curry and garlic bread.” Now, the chef has a clear understanding of your preferences and can prepare a dish that closely matches your expectations. You may further also add more context to your request. For example — “Make the dish more spicy.” or “Don’t put onion.” etc.

 

So, What Exactly is Prompt Engineering?

Similar to the above example, whenever you interact with any AI system, (say ChatGPT), you need to provide a clear prompt to get exactly the response you need.

In our analogy, the chef can only create the perfect dish if you communicate your desires effectively. Similar principle applies to AI models. The AI Models can provide perfect output only if we provide the prompt effectively.

For example, if you just give a prompt to ChatGPT (or any such text based AI model) — “Tell me a story.” Potential response could be any story, such as — “ Once upon a time, in a small village nestled between rolling hills and dense forests, there lived a young girl named Elara….”.

 

As shown in above image, the response is generic because the prompt lacks specifics.

 

However, let’s say you are looking for a bedtime story to tell your kid and your kid loves stories with animal character and you also want to add a moral to the story, then you might design your prompt such as — “Tell me a short story for kids which includes animal characters and has a nice moral at the end.”. In this case the AI model can better understand your expectation and give response which suits your need.

 

 

 

To summarize, we can say that — Prompt engineering is the process of designing and refining the input text (prompt) given to an AI model, to get the desired output. It involves crafting specific questions, statements, or instructions to guide the model to produce accurate and relevant responses.

 

Some More Examples to Understand it Better

Here are some examples of good and bad prompt:

Example 1

Bad prompt — “Tell me something interesting.”

Result: Response includes fun facts about Octopuses.

Good prompt — “Tell me a funny story about a dog.”

Result: Response includes a funny story about dog.

Better prompt — “Tell me a hilarious story about a dog who thinks he’s a cat and tries to climb trees.”

Result: Response includes a funny story about dog as you expect.

 

Example 2

Bad prompt — “How to deal with anger?”

Result: Response includes some theoretical tips and tricks. You may not like the tone.

Good prompt — “I am feeling very angry. Can you please help me deal with it.”

Result: Response will have empathetic tone and a personal touch.

 

Next Blog

Generative AI Jargons Simplified: Part 2 — AI Model [To be published]

entry.title: Publish Custom POD
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a Custom POD in SAP DM. I would like to publish it as a tile so that it is visible in the DM Dashboard for all operator who are working on that plant.
(NOTE:- I can publish this individually but I want to publish for all operator at a same time)

If it's possible, can you please mention the process to do so. Any help would be valuable.

Regards,
Kartik Singhal

 

SAP Digital Manufacturing @ManoelCosta @Jonas_Haas @rahul_kumar_04

entry.title: Definition of fixed and variable cost in SAP BP for SaaS company.
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently working on the Advisory Service Project. We are in the process of designing a Profitability Analysis that aligns with SaaS businesses under the ECC 6.0 Ehp7 version.

I have a couple of questions regarding SAP Best Practices for the cloud(SaaS) industry:

1. How are fixed costs and variable costs defined and differentiated within the context of SAP Best Practices for Saas industries?

2. Does SaaS Industry also use Standard Price to measure standard cost for cost management?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for international trade vs SAP Global Trade Services
entry.content:
Thanks Ramana

I forgot to add it's S4 Public cloud. However note that the help for Control code which you suggest is "Control code for consumption taxes in foreign trade" whereas the PRODCOM field says "......The PRODCOM (PRODuction COMmunautaire) list items have been defined and classified according to the Harmonized System for describing and coding goods (HS) and the Combined Nomenclature for foreign trade." Hence I thought the HS-code would go into the PRODCOM field in S4 on prem or ECC? (and still looking for where in the "International Trade" apps in Pub cloud.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Derivations using BADI in SAP MDG
entry.content:
Hello Abdul,

            Yes, Cost Center belongs to Type 1 entity and Cost Center acts as leading entity which we can consider as one of the field of Cost Center entity. Now I am deriving the value for CC based on Company Code and Business Area which also belongs to the same Cost Center entity. You can check Fig 1 of NWBC Screen which I shared in the post. 

And the answer to your next question is we are deriving the value of Cost Center for create process its not for update. If we are trying to create the value of Cost Center which is already there . The system will through you an error message saying " Cost Center is already present , please create the new one." which I have coded  through validations BADI. However, Cost Center we treat it like Primary key, we can update the other fields of Cost Center entity based on Cost Center value. You can check the rule thoroughly to understand the logic.

Applying the rule for particular Change Request can be handled by API's . You can refer to line number 45 in the logic.

Thanks,

Akhila

entry.title: Re: SAP DS - Split a Field at Separator into Multiple Rows
entry.content: If I'm not wrong, you get the expected result proposed by the post author. I don't know Python so I can't help more. The post author can't answer because it's a former member. You can check the Python documentation, ask in Python forums, etc.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Derivations using BADI in SAP MDG
entry.content:
Hi Steffen ,

              Thanks for sharing the document . The content is easier and can be done fastly compared to writing the complex logic. Definitely will implement this strategy when there is a requirement.

Thanks ,

Akhila

entry.title: Material does not exist -Error Message no. VK056
entry.content:
Hi,

While creating material determination, cross selling, BOMs in s4HANA SD module, I am getting the error message- "Material does not exist" - Error Message no. VK056. In other SD transactions, it is working fine. Kindly help.

Thanks and regards,

S.G. Sekar

entry.title: Re: How to Improve Query Performance in SAP Datasphere wh...
entry.content:
Hello,

as I understood you have a SAP Source(S4 or BW4) System (OP) operating on a SAP HANA Database.
So you should have the Data Stored hopefully in Memory Tables ;).

Since you are not allowed to replicate the Data into the DSP you have five Options only:

  1. Boost the Performance of the delivering source
    Meaning if your remote tables is a virutal Object in the Source that performance havy calculations and therfore requires time you should think of persisting the outcome of the "Virtual" Result if that is an option).
  2. Create Statistics on your remote Table
    In the Data Integration Monitor you can create Statistics for Remote Tables that will enable the SAP HANA Optimizier to optimize the SQL Statement send the source SAP HANA DB.

  3. Restrict the Outcome/Result
    If you have created Statistics and checked the performance of the source object itself it might be that the result you deliever is to granular (e.g. Displaying all Order since 2019).
    If you do this you can optimize whatever you want, if you 10 Mio Records have to be transfered and displayed this will result in a Timout
  4. Review your Datamodell
    Meaning check the JOIN Conditions, Filters and everything if it is optimized.
    e.g. You have Table 1 (ORDERS) that you Join with TABLE 2 on ORDER ID Level, the System will have to first load all ORDERS (10 Mio Records ) to than perform the JOIN.
    If you join on a more Aggregated level, the SQL Optimizier will do the Aggregation in the Source System and for example only return 400.000 Records as a Result that than have to be Joined with Table 2.
    Also Working with Assoications will boost your performance compared to hard used joins, as associations (Dimension, Text, Hierarchy ect.) will only be executed if required.
  5. if you need more detailed help I would suggest you get a Consultant

I hope this help's 😉.

BR
Julian

entry.title: Re: Get Usage of HANA Schema wise for License Utilization
entry.content:
DO
BEGIN
DECLARE num_of_schema double;
DECLARE header_count double;
DECLARE line_count double;
DECLARE initial_memory double =36;
DECLARE concurrent_users int;
DECLARE schema_memory double;
DECLARE data_memory double;
DECLARE max_memory double;
DECLARE CURSOR curs1 for 
       select schema_name, table_name 
         from public.tables 
        where SCHEMA_NAME in (select schema_name from PUBLIC.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME='CINF')
          and table_name in ('OINV','ORDR','OQUT','ODLN','OPCH','OPDN','OPOR','ORCT','OVPM','OIGE','OIGN','OWTR', 
                             'INV1','RDR1','QUT1','DLN1','PCH1','PDN1','POR1','RCT2','VPM2','IGE1','IGN1','WTR1');
    --LOAD tables
for cur_row as curs1()
do
    exec 'load "'|| cur_row.SCHEMA_NAME ||'"."' || cur_row.TABLE_NAME ||'" all';
end for;
 
 
SELECT COUNT('A') into concurrent_users FROM M_CONNECTIONS WHERE CONNECTION_ID>0 AND CURRENT_SCHEMA_NAME IN (SELECT SCHEMA_NAME FROM M_CS_TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME='CINF');
SELECT COUNT(TABLE_NAME) INTO num_of_schema FROM M_CS_TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME='CINF';
schema_memory = :num_of_schema * 4;
 
 
SELECT SUM(RECORD_COUNT) INTO header_count FROM M_CS_TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME IN ('OINV','ORDR','OQUT','ODLN','OPCH','OPDN','OPOR','ORCT','OVPM','OIGE','OIGN','OWTR');
SELECT SUM(RECORD_COUNT) INTO line_count FROM M_CS_TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME IN ('INV1','RDR1','QUT1','DLN1','PCH1','PDN1','POR1','RCT2','VPM2','IGE1','IGN1','WTR1');
data_memory = :header_count*2/300/1024 + :line_count/300/1024;
 
IF :schema_memory>:data_memory
THEN 
   max_memory=:schema_memory;
ELSE
   max_memory=:data_memory;
END IF;
 
--add round function here
SELECT 
round(:max_memory + :initial_memory + :concurrent_users * 0.15 / 2, 2) AS "Required memory (GB)",
:num_of_schema AS "Num of Schema",
:header_count AS "Num of Documents (partially)",
round(:line_count / :header_count, 2) AS "Document Avg Lines",
:concurrent_users AS "Company Database Connections"
FROM DUMMY;
END;

entry.title: Re: Regulatory Change Manager: Your Solution to Navigate Regulatory Changes with Ease
entry.content:
For anyone keen to log into the tool and take a look, the URL is https://app.main.regulatory-change-manager.cloud.sap The app requires an S-User to use.

This was a little tricky to find, as only the webinar recording mentioned this, and it's also not visible in the SAP Help documentation...

entry.title: SAP CDC Integration without screensets
entry.content:
We have a use case where we need CDC to do two things

1) Check for duplication

2) Login & Registration Authentication

COnstraints:

1) We don't want to use CDC screensets and use our own login/register screens

2) In case of register, We want to have the record created in Salesforce CRM as well in realtime as the registeration is happening in CDC. And salesforce should confirm that the record is created.

Any thoughts on the approach?

#SAP CDC #gigya #customerdatacloud

entry.title: Re: Change Company Code Currency after go live
entry.content:
Hi Joan,

 

the change of company code currency in a production system is not allowed to avoid possible serious damage and inconsistency to the posted data.

In such a case I would rather ask for an additional service by SAP to do the currency conversion for you. "SAP currency conversion service"

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Can I adjust the number of digits displayed after dec...
entry.content:
@geenaouellette 

This can be achieved using adjusted rating scale configuration as below.

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2175998 

Please mark this as answer so others can get benefit from it.

 

Thanks

Mridul
